# Tasks: Bidirectional Config Sync

**Branch**: `008-bidirectional-config-sync` | **Date**: 2026-05-14
**Generated by**: `speckit-tasks` after `speckit-plan` (Constitution Check 8/8 PASS).
**Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md) | **Plan**: [plan.md](./plan.md) | **Contracts**: [contracts/](./contracts/) | **Data model**: [data-model.md](./data-model.md) | **Research**: [research.md](./research.md)

---

## Overview

**~85 задач в 12 фазах** (mirror спека 007's structure). Каждая задача:
- Привязана к FR / SC из spec.md и/или к Plan section / checklist action item.
- Имеет explicit acceptance criteria.
- Указывает файл(ы), которые создаёт/меняет.
- Зависимости на другие задачи указаны явно (`requires: T0NN`).

**Маркеры**:
- `[P]` — task можно делать параллельно с другими `[P]` в той же фазе (разные файлы, no shared state).
- `[M]` — manual step (требует ручного действия пользователя).
- `[CRIT]` — критический путь / gate перед следующей фазой.

**Параллелизация между фазами**:
- Phase 5 (Worker) можно делать параллельно с Phase 4 (Android adapters).
- Phase 6 (Security Rules) можно делать параллельно с Phase 4/5.
- Внутри одной фазы — большинство задач параллельные (см. `[P]` маркер).

**Действие итеративное**: после каждой фазы — push + checkpoint. Per CLAUDE.md §Branching: «open PR as soon as branch has reviewable first commit; keep pushing as work progresses».

---

## Phase 0 — Environment prep & coordination

**Goal**: Подготовка зависимостей, координация с TODO-ARCH-006, Security Rules baseline.

### T001 [M] [CRIT] Verify TODO-ARCH-006 (R8 minification) status

- **Traces to**: research.md §6, plan.md Risk R3.
- **Dependencies**: none.
- **Action**: Project owner проверяет `docs/dev/project-backlog.md` — статус TODO-ARCH-006. Если 🔴 OPEN — назначить владельца R8-enable до Phase 12 этого спека.
- **Acceptance**: Status либо ✅ DONE, либо явный план landing до конца спека 008.
- **Why manual**: coordination call, не code change.

### T002 [P] Wire SQLDelight dependencies in :core

- **Traces to**: plan.md §Dependency Impact, FR-041, FR-042.
- **Dependencies**: none.
- **File(s)**: `core/build.gradle.kts` (SQLDelight version + plugin already declared в `gradle/libs.versions.toml`).
- **Action**: применить:
  - Apply `app.cash.sqldelight` Gradle plugin к :core.
  - В `commonMain`: implementation `sqldelight-runtime` + `sqldelight-coroutines-extensions`.
  - В `androidMain`: implementation `sqldelight-android-driver`.
  - SQLDelight `databases { create("ConfigStore") { packageName.set("com.launcher.adapters.config.db") } }`.
- **Acceptance**: `./gradlew :core:generateCommonMainConfigStoreInterface` runs without error (после T050 schema создан).

### T003 [P] Update docs/compliance/permissions-and-resource-budget.md

- **Traces to**: security checklist CHK018, plan.md §Required Context Review.
- **Dependencies**: none.
- **File(s)**: `docs/compliance/permissions-and-resource-budget.md`.
- **Action**: добавить запись: «spec 008 не добавляет новых runtime permissions; переиспользует INTERNET + ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE из спека 007 (для ConnectivityManager.NetworkCallback)».
- **Acceptance**: запись в документе; cross-link на spec 008.

### T004 [P] Write Security Rules diff baseline (commitable draft)

- **Traces to**: FR-011, contracts/config.md §Security Rules.
- **Dependencies**: none.
- **File(s)**: `firestore.rules` (existing from спека 007).
- **Action**: добавить rule блок для `/links/{linkId}/config/current` (read/create/update/delete) per contracts/config.md §Security Rules. Запушить на Firestore Emulator (deploy позже в Phase 5).
- **Acceptance**: `firebase emulators:start --only firestore` загружает обновлённые rules без syntax error.

### T005 [CRIT] Confirm legacy spec 003 mock-storage paths

- **Traces to**: FR-045, research.md §4, meta-minimization checklist CHK012.
- **Dependencies**: none.
- **Action**: grep по 003-коду (`specs/003-ui-skeleton/` + `core/src/`), выписать exact file paths используемых mock storage'ов. Записать в plan.md §Notes или в новый файл `legacy-cleanup-inventory.md`. **Дополнительно**: grep по `docs/` + другим `specs/` для ссылок на эти paths — обновить ссылки если найдены (per cross-artifact-trace check 6b).
- **Acceptance**: explicit list of paths; будет использован в T054; нет orphan references в `docs/` / `specs/`.

### T006 [P] Open PR на ветке 008 (первый push)

- **Traces to**: CLAUDE.md §Branching, plan.md §Rollout.
- **Dependencies**: T002, T003 (есть reviewable изменения).
- **Action**: `git push -u origin 008-bidirectional-config-sync`; `gh pr create` с body из plan.md §Summary.
- **Acceptance**: PR URL получен; CI passes (если есть).

**Checkpoint Phase 0**: dependencies added, compliance docs updated, Security Rules draft validated в emulator, PR opened.

## Phase 1 — Domain types (commonMain)

**Goal**: Pure-Kotlin domain types для wire format, diff, errors, ports.

### T010 [P] Create ElementId value class

- **Traces to**: FR-004, research.md §2, data-model.md §ElementId.
- **Dependencies**: T002 (Kotlin 2.0.20+).
- **File(s)**: `core/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/launcher/api/config/ElementId.kt`.
- **Action**: реализовать `@JvmInline value class ElementId(val value: String)` с UUID v4 validation в `init`. `Uuid.random()` factory через `kotlin.uuid.Uuid`.
- **Acceptance**: unit test `ElementIdTest.random_generates_valid_uuid_v4` green; `ElementIdTest.invalid_string_throws` green.

- **Traces to**: FR-002, data-model.md §ServerTimestamp.
- **Dependencies**: none.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/launcher/api/config/ServerTimestamp.kt`.
- **Action**: `@Serializable data class ServerTimestamp(val epochSeconds: Long, val nanoseconds: Int)` + `compareTo` для optimistic-concurrency comparisons.
- **Acceptance**: unit test `ServerTimestampTest.compareTo_monotonic` green.

- **File(s)**: `core/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/launcher/api/config/ConfigDocument.kt`, `Flow.kt`, `Slot.kt`, `Contact.kt`, `SlotKind.kt`.
- **Action**: @Serializable data classes per data-model.md. SlotKind как sealed enum (Call, Sms, OpenApp + companion `fromWireOrNull` для forward-compat).
- **Acceptance**: compile clean; instantiable; `SCHEMA_VERSION = 1` constant exposed.

- **Acceptance**: existing 007 tests still pass; KDoc clear about spec 008 reuse.

**Checkpoint Phase 1**: All domain types compile; all ports defined; no behaviour yet. Foundation ready for Phase 2.

**Goal**: Roundtrip + backward-compat tests for wire formats; fake adapters per CLAUDE.md §6.

- **Action**: kotlinx.serialization-based encoder/decoder. **schemaVersion MUST be read first** (wire-format checklist CHK002) — implement через manual JsonElement inspection before full parse.
- **Acceptance**: compile clean; T031..T033 tests use it.

## Phase 3 — Real adapter: SQLDelight (commonMain schema + androidMain driver)

**Goal**: Production-grade SQLDelight persistence (KMP-friendly) with cleanup-on-first-launch for legacy spec 003 mock-storage.

### T050 [CRIT] Create SQLDelight schema (.sq file in commonMain)

- **Traces to**: FR-041, FR-042, data-model.md §Persistence.
- **Dependencies**: T002, T012.
- **File(s)**:
  - `core/src/commonMain/sqldelight/com/launcher/adapters/config/db/ConfigStore.sq` (schema + queries per data-model.md).
- **Action**: создать `.sq` file с `applied_config` + `pending_changes` таблицами и queries (readAppliedConfig, upsertAppliedConfig, readPending, upsertPending, clearPending, allPendingLinks).
- **Acceptance**: `./gradlew :core:generateCommonMainConfigStoreInterface` generates `ConfigStoreQueries` class (commonMain).

### T051 [P] Implement SqlDelightLocalConfigStore adapter (commonMain)

- **Traces to**: data-model.md §Domain ports inventory.
- **Dependencies**: T050, T020.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/commonMain/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/config/SqlDelightLocalConfigStore.kt`.
- **Action**: implements `LocalConfigStore` (commonMain port) via generated `ConfigStoreQueries`. JSON ↔ ConfigDocument конверсия через `Json.encodeToString`/`decodeFromString`. **commonMain** — works on Android и future iOS through different drivers.
- **Acceptance**: compile clean for both `compileCommonMainKotlinMetadata` и `compileDebugKotlinAndroid`.

### T051a [P] Implement AndroidSqlDriverProvider (androidMain)

- **Traces to**: plan.md §Module map.
- **Dependencies**: T050.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/androidMain/kotlin/com/launcher/adapters/config/AndroidSqlDriverProvider.kt`.
- **Action**: factory function `provideConfigStoreDriver(context: Context): SqlDriver` returning `AndroidSqliteDriver(ConfigStore.Schema, context, "config_sync.db")`. Lazy initialization.
- **Acceptance**: compile clean.

### T052 [P] Test: SqlDelightLocalConfigStore behaviour contract

- **Traces to**: CLAUDE.md §6 (mock-first parity).
- **Dependencies**: T051.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/commonTest/kotlin/.../SqlDelightLocalConfigStoreTest.kt`.
- **Action**: same contract test as T039, run against `JdbcSqliteDriver(IN_MEMORY)` (commonTest — uses sqldelight-jdbc-driver test dependency or platform's in-memory).
- **Acceptance**: tests green; same assertions pass as Fake adapter.

### T053 [P] Migration test scaffolding

- **Traces to**: data-model.md §Persistence schema versioning, wire-format CHK014.
- **Dependencies**: T050.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/commonTest/kotlin/.../ConfigStoreMigrationTest.kt`.
- **Action**: invoke `ConfigStore.Schema.verifyMigrations()` (SQLDelight API, no migrations yet — asserts initial schema). Documented comment: «add migration test when `.sqm` files appear».
- **Acceptance**: test green; infrastructure ready for future migrations.

### T054 [CRIT] Implement LegacyMockStorageCleanup (FR-045)

- **Traces to**: FR-045, research.md §4, meta-minimization CHK012.
- **Dependencies**: T005 (paths inventory).
- **File(s)**: `core/src/androidMain/.../LegacyMockStorageCleanup.kt`.
- **Action**: per research.md §4 code skeleton. Grep-anchor comment: `// CLEANUP-008: legacy spec 003 mock-JSON storage. Safe to remove after 2026-12-31`.
- **Acceptance**: unit test `LegacyMockStorageCleanupTest` — `cleanupOnce_deletes_known_files` green.

### T055 [P] Test: LegacyMockStorageCleanup grep-verification

- **Traces to**: FR-045, meta-minimization CHK012.
- **Dependencies**: T054.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/androidUnitTest/.../LegacyMockStorageCleanupTest.kt` (extend T054 test).

**Checkpoint Phase 3**: SQLDelight persistence works; Fake/Real parity verified; legacy cleanup implemented.

## Phase 4 — Real adapter: Firebase (androidMain)

**Goal**: FirebaseConfigApplier + DefaultConfigEditor с optimistic concurrency.

### T060 [CRIT] Implement FirebaseConfigApplier

- **Traces to**: FR-021, FR-023, FR-030, plan.md data flow «Push happy path».
- **Dependencies**: T018, T051, RemoteSyncBackend (existing 007).
- **File(s)**: `core/src/androidMain/.../FirebaseConfigApplier.kt`.
- **Action**: implements `ConfigApplier`. Reads `/config/current` via `RemoteSyncBackend.readDoc()`. Atomically writes to Room (via LocalConfigStore). Writes `/state/current` with `appliedConfigUpdatedAt` via `writeDoc()`. FR-023 self-as-writer skip check.
- **Acceptance**: compile clean; T061 tests green.

### T061 [P] Test: FirebaseConfigApplier idempotent apply + state write

- **Traces to**: FR-021, FR-023.
- **Dependencies**: T060.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/androidUnitTest/.../FirebaseConfigApplierTest.kt`.
- **Action**: tests with FakeRemoteSyncBackend (from 007) + SqlDelightLocalConfigStore. Asserts /state write happens after Room write.
- **Acceptance**: tests green.

### T062 [CRIT] Implement DefaultConfigEditor с optimistic concurrency

- **Traces to**: FR-010..014, FR-040, FR-054..057, research.md §1.
- **Dependencies**: T019, T020, T060.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/androidMain/.../DefaultConfigEditor.kt`.
- **Action**: implements `ConfigEditor`. Push flow uses `RemoteSyncBackend.runTransaction { read /config/current → check serverUpdatedAt == clientSnapshot.serverUpdatedAt → write OR throw TransactionConflict }`. On conflict: read fresh /config, compute diff, return Conflict error.
- **Acceptance**: compile clean.

### T063 [P] Test: DefaultConfigEditor — push happy path

- **Traces to**: US-1 scenario 1, FR-010..013.
- **Dependencies**: T062.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/androidUnitTest/.../DefaultConfigEditorTest.kt`.
- **Action**: with FakeRemoteSyncBackend programmable «return matching serverUpdatedAt» — push succeeds, /config written with new server-side timestamp.
- **Acceptance**: test green.

### T064 [P] Test: DefaultConfigEditor — conflict path

- **Traces to**: US-2 scenario 1, FR-013, FR-014.

- **Traces to**: FR-050, FR-051, FR-053.

- **Action**: list of diff elements; per-element 3 buttons («Оставить моё» / «Оставить серверное» / «Применить оба» where applicable); top action buttons «Save» / «Отмена». Standard sizing (not senior-safe override per FR-050 exception).
- **Acceptance**: compose preview; explicit a11y labels on buttons.

- **Traces to**: FR-053.
- **Dependencies**: T110.
- **File(s)**: same MergeComponent.
- **Action**: if `diff.hasOverlappingChanges == false` → preselect «Применить оба» for all elements; show banner «Изменения не пересекаются, применить оба?»; user can confirm or override.
- **Acceptance**: test T114.

- **Dependencies**: T062.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/androidMain/.../DefaultConfigEditor.kt` (or move to commonMain logic).
- **Action**: when ConfigEditor receives Conflict but `diff.isEmpty` → skip showing UI, re-push с fresh snapshot.

- **File(s)**: `app/src/main/kotlin/.../ui/merge/MergeScreenTest.kt`.
- **Action**: tests:
  - `state_restoration_preserves_choices` — partial choice → recreate → choices preserved (rememberSaveable).
  - `cancel_preserves_pending` (FR-055).
  - `save_applies_user_choices` — diff resolved per choice → ConfigEditor.pushPending called with merged config.
  - `auto_merge_default_for_non_overlapping` (FR-053).
- **Acceptance**: 4 tests green.

## Phase 11 — In-process end-to-end test

**Goal**: Multi-editor collaborative scenario in single JVM test.

### T130 [CRIT] Implement in-process E2E test для US-1, US-2, US-4

- **Traces to**: US-1, US-2 (all 5 scenarios), US-4, SC-003.
- **Dependencies**: T042 (FakeConfigEditor), T040 (FakeConfigApplier), FakeRemoteSyncBackend (existing 007).
- **File(s)**: `core/src/commonTest/.../e2e/ConfigSyncE2ETest.kt`.
- **Action**: single test JVM с 2 FakeConfigEditor instances + 1 FakeConfigApplier sharing single FakeRemoteSyncBackend (simulates server). Scenarios:
  - `editorA_push_no_conflict` (US-1 happy path).
  - `editorA_push_then_editorB_push_conflict_merge` (US-2 scenario 1).
  - `both_delete_same_element_auto_resolve` (US-2 scenario 4).
  - `editorB_offline_save_locally_then_online_pending_visible` (US-3 scenario 3, US-4).
- **Acceptance**: 4 E2E tests green.

- **Dependencies**: T130.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/commonTest/.../e2e/ConfigSyncSC003Test.kt`.
- **Action**: loop 100 pushes (mix of no-conflict + conflict scenarios); assert outcome counter == 100 (every push → either state-update or merge-conflict-result).
- **Acceptance**: test green; 0 silent failures.

## Phase 12 — Perf checkpoint + smoke + docs

**Goal**: Verify SC-004a, measure APK delta, manual smoke, update docs.

### T140 [CRIT] Macrobenchmark SC-004a (cold start ≤ 650 ms p95)

- **Traces to**: SC-004a, plan.md §Rollout, research.md §6.
- **Dependencies**: T060, T094, T096.
- **File(s)**: `core/src/androidBenchmark/.../ConfigSyncStartupBenchmark.kt` (new module if not exists, or extend existing benchmark module).
- **Action**: Macrobenchmark с `MeasureCriterion.StartupCriterion`. Simulate process death; measure time from Activity#onCreate to first frame с last-applied-config. 20 iterations, p95 ≤ 650 ms.
- **Acceptance**: benchmark passes; results recorded in T141.
- **Status (2026-05-15)**: ⚠ DEFERRED — `:benchmark` Gradle module не существует (settings.gradle.kts содержит только `:app`, `:core`). Tracked в [TODO-PERF-001](../../docs/dev/project-backlog.md#todo-perf-001-macrobenchmark-module-для-t140-cold-start--650-ms-p95-).

### T141 [CRIT] Create perf-checkpoint.md

- **Traces to**: plan.md §Rollout, спек 007 perf-checkpoint pattern.
- **Dependencies**: T140.
- **File(s)**: `specs/008-bidirectional-config-sync/perf-checkpoint.md`.
- **Action**: document measured values:
  - SC-004a cold start p95 (target ≤ 650 ms).
  - Room read sub-budget (target ≤ 50 ms p95).
  - APK delta (target < 4 MiB after R8).
  - WorkManager wakeup frequency over 24h trial.
- **Acceptance**: all targets met OR exception documented в Complexity Tracking.

### T142 [CRIT] APK size delta measurement

- **Traces to**: plan.md Risk R3, research.md §6.
- **Dependencies**: T141, T001 status of R8.
- **Action**: build `realBackend` release APK; measure delta vs спек 007 baseline (3.99 MiB); document in perf-checkpoint.md. **Gate**: if delta > 4 MiB → block merge until R8 (TODO-ARCH-006) lands.
- **Acceptance**: delta < 4 MiB OR clear remediation plan.
- **Status (2026-05-15)**: ✅ **MEASURED** — 3.79 MiB без R8 (под бюджетом). Detail в [perf-checkpoint.md §APK delta](perf-checkpoint.md). R8 (TODO-ARCH-006) больше не блокер для 008.

### T143 [M] Manual 2-device smoke test

- **Traces to**: plan.md §Rollout, US-1 + US-2 + US-3 + US-4.
- **Dependencies**: T096, T130.
- **File(s)**: `specs/008-bidirectional-config-sync/smoke/README.md`.
- **Action**: project owner runs on 2 physical Android devices:
  - Edit on device A → push → applied on device B (visible change на launcher screen).
  - Two devices edit parallel → conflict → merge UI.
  - Device A offline → save локально → banner visible → online → push.
- **Acceptance**: manual smoke log committed; screenshots attached.
- **Status (2026-05-15)**: ⚠ DEFERRED — попытка запуска realBackend на эмуляторе обнаружила блокер ([TODO-SMOKE-001](../../docs/dev/project-backlog.md#todo-smoke-001-wire-comgooglegmsgoogle-services-plugin-для-realbackend-flavor-) — google-services plugin не applied; FirebaseApp init крашится). После TODO-SMOKE-001 эмулятор покроет US-1/US-3/US-5; реальные девайсы остаются нужны для US-2/US-4 + OEM-coverage ([TODO-DEVICE-002](../../docs/dev/project-backlog.md#todo-device-002-t143-multi-device-manual-smoke-us-1us-5-с-реальными-oem-)).

---

<!-- novice summary -->

## TL;DR

«Инструкция программисту: как реализовать спек 008, разбитая на маленькие шаги». 85 задач в 12 фазах:
- **Фаза 0**: подготовка (Room в gradle, документы, открыть PR).
- **Фазы 1-2**: создать типы данных и тесты на формат (что будет передаваться по сети).
- **Фазы 3-4**: подключить настоящие Firebase + Room.
- **Фазы 5-6**: настроить правила доступа на сервере и расширить Cloudflare Worker (он шлёт push-уведомления).
- **Фаза 7**: 4 способа узнать «есть ли новый конфиг на сервере» (FCM, появилась сеть, периодический опрос, экран включился).
- **Фазы 8-9**: пользовательский интерфейс (редактор, индикатор «отправлено», экран разрешения конфликтов).
- **Фаза 10**: автоматические проверки правильности кода (Konsist).
- **Фазы 11-12**: тесты всё-в-одном, замер скорости запуска, ручная проверка на двух телефонах.

Каждая задача в самом конце имеет «traceability matrix» — список «какое требование из спеки она закрывает». Это нужно, чтобы потом легко понять, что нигде не забыли. Срок: 5-7 недель.
